title: Stretchy Squishy Toys, Soft Squeeze Elastic Kneading Toy for Kids, Teens and Adults, Stuff Fidget Toy for Hand and Fingers Exercising (Carrot)

description: Product Description Funky Rubber Chicken Squeaky Toy From Pet Playtime to Party Pranks – Endless Laughs and Interactive Fun in One Toy. W hether it’s a party, prank, or TikTok video, this s quawking chicken steals the show every time. Interactive Squeaky Chicken Dog Toy Dogs love the funny noise and chewy texture. Great for playtime, bonding, and keeping your furry friend entertained. Stress Reliever Having a rough day? Give the chicken a squeeze and let the ridiculous squawk do its magic! Random Squawking Chicken Game Toy – Loud, Laughable, and Legendary! From teenagers to toddlers to adults, everyone will laugh when this chicken lets out its signature scream. Premium Quality & Durability Crafted from high-quality rubber for a soft yet strong feel. Built to last through countless squeezes, squawks, and stress-relieving moments. Random Funky Design Each order includes 1 funky rubber chicken toy – color and expression may vary, adding to the surprise and silliness!
